521:  buh_e
522:  buh_line "The repo-vs-personal split is deliberate: ${RBYC_BURC} travels with the code; ${RBYC_BURS} stays on your machine."
523:  buh_e
526:  buh_step1 "Validate your station"
527:  buh_e
528:  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_REGIME} has a validate tabtarget that checks the file against"
529:  buh_line "its schema. This may fail if your station file is missing fields"
530:  buh_line "beyond the minimum the launcher required — that is expected."
531:  buh_line "Run it:"
532:  buh_e
533:  buh_tt   "   " "${BUWZ_RS_VALIDATE}"
534:  buh_e
535:  buh_line "Read the error if it fails — it names the field and tells you"
536:  buh_line "what to fill in."
537:  buh_e
543:    buh_line "${z_mark} Station file present at ${z_path}"
547:  buh_e
550:  buh_step1 "Validate the repo regime"
551:  buh_e
552:  buh_line "The repository regime (${RBYC_RBRR}) holds your team's ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
553:  buh_line "identity — the GCP project where container images are built and stored."
554:  buh_line "Run the validator:"
555:  buh_e
556:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO}"
557:  buh_e
558:  buh_line "On a bare fork, ${RBYC_RBRR} fields are blank and validation will fail —"
559:  buh_line "you need a ${RBYC_PAYOR} account and a ${RBYC_DEPOT} to populate them."
560:  buh_line "On a team repo, they are already populated and validation passes."
561:  buh_line "Either way, read the output — it tells you exactly what state you're in."
562:  buh_e
568:  buh_e
571:  buh_step1 "Check your logs"
572:  buh_e
573:  buh_line "When you ran the validator, it printed file paths at the top"
574:  buh_line "of its output. Every state-changing command writes three ${RBYC_LOG}"
575:  buh_line "files to ${RBYC_BURS}_LOG_DIR:"
576:  buh_e
580:    buh_line "   stable    ${z_log_path}  (always the same path, great for Claude)"
582:    buh_line "   stable    always the same path — tooling reads this one"
584:  buh_line "   per-cmd   same filename across runs — diff between executions"
585:  buh_line "   history   timestamped — permanent record, never overwritten"
586:  buh_e
587:  buh_line "Some commands also write a ${RBYC_TRANSCRIPT} — a single file"
588:  buh_line "capturing key decision points and state transitions. When a"
589:  buh_line "command fails, the transcript is the first thing to read."
590:  buh_e
591:  buh_line "Handbook display commands (like this one) do not log — teaching"
592:  buh_line "output is ephemeral by design."
593:  buh_e
596:  buh_step1 "The pattern"
597:  buh_e
598:  buh_line "Every ${RBYC_REGIME} has a render and a validate tabtarget."
599:  buh_line "The letter after \`r\` is all that changes:"
600:  buh_e
617:  buh_line "   c  ${RBYC_BURC}  ${z_rc_r}   ${z_rc_v}"
618:  buh_line "   s  ${RBYC_BURS}  ${z_rs_r}  ${z_rs_v}"
619:  buh_line "   r  ${RBYC_RBRR}  ${z_rr_r}     ${z_rr_v}"
620:  buh_line "   p  ${RBYC_RBRP}  ${z_rp_r}    ${z_rp_v}"
621:  buh_line "   o  ${RBYC_RBRO}  ${z_ro_r}    ${z_ro_v}"
622:  buh_e
623:  buh_line "These take a target name (vessel, nameplate, or role):"
624:  buh_e
625:  buh_line "   v  ${RBYC_RBRV}  ${z_rv_r}     ${z_rv_v}"
626:  buh_line "   n  ${RBYC_RBRN}  ${z_rn_r}  ${z_rn_v}"
627:  buh_line "   a  ${RBYC_RBRA}  ${z_ra_r}       ${z_ra_v}"
628:  buh_e
629:  buh_line "Learn the letter — you can find any regime's tools from it."
630:  buh_e
633:  buh_step1 "Next steps"
634:  buh_e
635:  buh_line "Your repo environment is configured. The tools work, errors explain"
636:  buh_line "themselves, and ${RBYC_LOGS} land where you told them to."
637:  buh_e
638:  buh_line "Return to the start menu for what to do next:"
639:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
640:  buh_e
665:  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
668:  buh_step1 "Get the key file"
669:  buh_e
670:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} produces ${RBYC_RBRA} credential files for ${RBYC_DIRECTORS} and ${RBYC_RETRIEVERS}."
671:  buh_line "Your ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} hands you this file out-of-band — it is a"
672:  buh_line "secret, never committed to the repo."
673:  buh_e
676:  buh_step1 "Install the key file"
677:  buh_e
679:    buh_line "Place the file at the path derived from ${RBYC_RBRR}:"
680:    buh_e
681:    buh_code "   ${z_secrets_dir}/${z_role_constant}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"
682:    buh_e
683:    buh_line "Create the directory if it does not exist."
685:    buh_warn "RBRR not populated — cannot determine credential path."
688:    buh_line "Run ${z_env_link} first."
690:  buh_e
696:  buh_e
699:  buh_step1 "Validate"
700:  buh_e
701:  buh_line "Run the ${RBYC_RBRA} validator for your role:"
702:  buh_e
703:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH}" "" " ${z_role_constant}"
704:  buh_e
705:  buh_line "Read the output — it checks the file format and reports"
706:  buh_line "what the credential grants."
707:  buh_e
719:  buh_section "Install Retriever Credentials"
720:  buh_e
721:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_RETRIEVER} pulls container images from the"
722:  buh_line "  ${RBYC_DEPOT} — read-only access to what others have built."
723:  buh_e
728:  buh_step1 "Confirm live access"
729:  buh_e
730:  buh_line "Run ${RBYC_TALLY} to list ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} in the registry using your retriever credential:"
731:  buh_e
732:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_TALLY_HALLMARKS}"
733:  buh_e
734:  buh_line "If the command succeeds you have working pull access to the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
735:  buh_line "If it fails, re-check the file placement in Step 2."
736:  buh_e
739:  buh_step1 "Next steps"
740:  buh_e
741:  buh_line "Return to the start menu:"
742:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
743:  buh_e
753:  buh_section "Install Director Credentials"
754:  buh_e
755:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_DIRECTOR} causes cloud builds and publishes container images to the"
756:  buh_line "  ${RBYC_DEPOT} — write access to the registry."
757:  buh_e
762:  buh_step1 "Confirm live access"
763:  buh_e
764:  buh_line "Run ${RBYC_REKON} to list raw image tags in the registry"
765:  buh_line "using your director credential:"
766:  buh_e
767:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_REKON_IMAGE}" "" " rbev-busybox"
768:  buh_e
769:  buh_line "If the command succeeds you have working build access to the"
770:  buh_line "  ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
771:  buh_line "If it fails, re-check the file placement in Step 2."
772:  buh_e
775:  buh_step1 "Next steps"
776:  buh_e
777:  buh_line "Return to the start menu:"
778:  buh_tt   "   " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
779:  buh_e
869:  buh_section "Start a Crucible Using Local Builds"
870:  buh_e
871:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} is a sandboxed container environment with enforced"
872:  buh_line "network isolation. You are going to build one on your workstation"
873:  buh_line "and run Claude Code inside it — no cloud account, no credentials"
874:  buh_line "beyond your own Claude subscription."
875:  buh_e
876:  buh_line "This track uses the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE}: a Claude Code sandbox that can"
877:  buh_line "only reach Anthropic. Everything else is blocked."
878:  buh_e
882:    buh_error "Docker is not available on this machine."
883:    buh_line  "Install Docker Desktop (or dockerd in WSL) and re-run this handbook."
884:    buh_e
885:    buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
886:    buh_e
890:  buh_line "Prerequisite: a Claude OAuth subscription (you will authenticate"
891:  buh_line "inside the container via copy/paste from your browser)."
892:  buh_e
894:  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
899:  buh_step1 "Build images locally"
900:  buh_e
901:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_VESSEL} is a specification for a container image — a Dockerfile"
902:  buh_line "and build context. A ${RBYC_HALLMARK} is a specific build instance,"
903:  buh_line "identified by a timestamp tag."
904:  buh_e
905:  buh_line "${RBYC_KLUDGE} builds a vessel image locally using Docker — no cloud, no"
906:  buh_line "registry, no credentials. The fastest path from Dockerfile to running"
907:  buh_line "container without cloud image backup."
908:  buh_e
911:  buh_step2 "Kludge the sentry"
912:  buh_e
913:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} is the gatekeeper container. It runs iptables"
914:  buh_line "and dnsmasq to enforce network policy — only domains you whitelist"
915:  buh_line "are reachable from inside."
916:  buh_e
917:  buh_line "Kludge it:"
918:  buh_e
919:  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_KLUDGE_VESSEL}" "" " ${z_sentry_vessel}"
920:  buh_e
921:  buh_line "The output prints a hallmark tag — something like"
922:  buh_line "${z_example_tag}"
923:  buh_line "Copy it. You will paste it into the nameplate in Step 2."
924:  buh_e
928:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Kludge-tagged sentry image found locally"
930:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No kludge-tagged sentry image found"
932:  buh_e
934:  buh_warn "Kludge requires a clean git tree."
935:  buh_line "If you have uncommitted changes, commit them first.  This is by"
936:  buh_line "design — container images not backed by git commits easy to confuse."
937:  buh_e
940:  buh_step2 "Kludge the bottle"
941:  buh_e
942:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your workload container — where Claude Code"
943:  buh_line "runs. The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} bottle includes SSH, node, and the Claude CLI."
944:  buh_e
945:  buh_line "This command is different from the sentry kludge. It builds the"
946:  buh_line "bottle AND drives the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} into the nameplate"
947:  buh_line "automatically:"
948:  buh_e
949:  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
950:  buh_e
951:  buh_line "Two kludge commands, two different jobs:"
952:  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_fk}  — standalone vessel kludge. Produces a hallmark, touches nothing else."
953:  buh_line "  ${z_cmd_rbw_cKB} — nameplate-aware bottle kludge. Builds AND installs the hallmark."
954:  buh_e
955:  buh_line "The sentry is shared across nameplates, so you kludge it standalone"
956:  buh_line "and drive the hallmark yourself. The bottle belongs to one nameplate,"
957:  buh_line "so the tool does the driving for you."
958:  buh_e
962:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Kludge-tagged bottle image found locally"
964:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}No kludge-tagged bottle image found"
966:  buh_e
971:  buh_step1 "Drive sentry hallmark into the nameplate"
972:  buh_e
973:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} is the file that defines a Crucible — it specifies"
974:  buh_line "what ${RBYC_HALLMARK} to use for ${RBYC_SENTRY}, ${RBYC_PENTACLE}, and"
975:  buh_line "${RBYC_BOTTLE} containers. It lives at:"
976:  buh_e
977:  buh_code "   ${z_nameplate_file}"
978:  buh_e
979:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RBRN} file has two hallmark fields — one for the sentry"
980:  buh_line "and one for the bottle. The bottle kludge (Step 1.2) already drove"
981:  buh_line "its hallmark. Now you drive the sentry hallmark by hand."
982:  buh_e
983:  buh_line "Open the nameplate file and paste the sentry hallmark from Step 1.1"
984:  buh_line "into the ${z_cmd_sentry_hallmark} field."
985:  buh_e
986:  buh_line "This is deliberately manual — it teaches you what ${RBYC_HALLMARKS} are and"
987:  buh_line "where they live. You just saw the automated version with the ${RBYC_BOTTLE};"
988:  buh_line "now you see the mechanism underneath."
989:  buh_e
993:    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_sentry_field} = ${z_sentry_hallmark}"
995:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK is empty — paste the sentry hallmark from Step 1.1"
998:    buh_line " [*] ${z_code_bottle_field} = ${z_bottle_hallmark}"
1000:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK is empty — run Step 1.2 (bottle kludge)"
1002:  buh_e
1004:  buh_line "After editing, commit the change — the next ${RBYC_KLUDGE} will need a"
1005:  buh_line "clean tree:"
1006:  buh_e
1007:  buh_code "   git add ${z_nameplate_file}"
1008:  buh_code "   git commit -m \"Drive sentry hallmark into ${z_moniker} nameplate\""
1009:  buh_e
1014:  buh_step1 "Charge the crucible"
1015:  buh_e
1016:  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} starts three containers from your nameplate:"
1017:  buh_e
1018:  buh_line "  ${RBYC_SENTRY}   — runs iptables + dnsmasq, enforces the network allowlist"
1019:  buh_line "  ${RBYC_PENTACLE}  — establishes the network namespace shared with the bottle"
1020:  buh_line "  ${RBYC_BOTTLE}    — your workload container (Claude Code lives here)"
1021:  buh_e
1022:  buh_line "The sentry mediates all traffic. The bottle never touches the"
1023:  buh_line "network directly — everything routes through the sentry's rules."
1024:  buh_e
1025:  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
1026:  buh_e
1027:  buh_line "Charge takes 10-30 seconds. It pulls the images from your local"
1028:  buh_line "Docker, creates the enclave network, starts the containers, waits"
1029:  buh_line "for the sentry to confirm its iptables rules are applied, then"
1030:  buh_line "starts the bottle."
1031:  buh_e
1035:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}Crucible ${z_moniker} is charged (bottle container running)"
1037:    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}Crucible ${z_moniker} is not charged"
1039:  buh_e
1044:  buh_step1 "Enter the container and run Claude Code"
1045:  buh_e
1046:  buh_line "SSH into the bottle:"
1047:  buh_e
1048:  buh_line "   ${z_cmd_ssh}"
1049:  buh_e
1050:  buh_line "You land as the claude user in ~/workspace, which contains"
1051:  buh_line "a small sample project. Run Claude Code:"
1052:  buh_e
1053:  buh_code "   claude"
1054:  buh_e
1055:  buh_line "Claude Code will prompt you to authenticate. It opens a URL —"
1056:  buh_line "copy it to your workstation browser, sign in with your Claude"
1057:  buh_line "subscription, and paste the code back into the terminal."
1058:  buh_e
1059:  buh_warn "The ccyolo bottle pins Claude Code to a specific version."
1060:  buh_line "Versions after v2.1.89 have a regression where paste does not"
1061:  buh_line "work in the OAuth input prompt through SSH or docker exec"
1062:  buh_line "(github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/47745). If you"
1063:  buh_line "update the pin and paste stops working, type the code manually."
1064:  buh_e
1065:  buh_line "Once authenticated, Claude Code starts in full autonomy mode —"
1066:  buh_line "no permission prompts. Inside a network-contained crucible,"
1067:  buh_line "this is the correct posture: the sentry enforces the real"
1068:  buh_line "security boundary, not the tool permission system."
1069:  buh_e
1070:  buh_line "Try your first interaction:"
1071:  buh_e
1072:  buh_code "   The count_words.sh script has bugs — can you find and fix them?"
1073:  buh_e
1074:  buh_line "Watch Claude read the files, identify issues, and edit the code."
1075:  buh_line "The workspace persists across charge/quench cycles — your changes"
1076:  buh_line "survive restarts."
1077:  buh_e
1078:  buh_line "Why SSH instead of docker exec?"
1079:  buh_e
1080:  buh_line "Docker exec is laggy and breaks terminal resize — Claude Code's"
1081:  buh_line "interactive display needs correct dimensions. SSH gives a proper"
1082:  buh_line "login session with full terminal negotiation."
1083:  buh_e
1084:  buh_line "If SSH fails, ${RBYC_RACK} is the diagnostic fallback —"
1085:  buh_line "docker exec into the bottle to inspect state:"
1086:  buh_e
1087:  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_RACK}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
1088:  buh_e
1093:  buh_step1 "Verify network containment"
1094:  buh_e
1095:  buh_line "From inside the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} (while SSH'd in), you can test what's reachable."
1096:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CCYOLO} nameplate allows Anthropic and example.com (a test"
1097:  buh_line "target). Everything else is blocked."
1098:  buh_e
1099:  buh_line "Run these curl commands inside the bottle:"
1100:  buh_e
1101:  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://api.anthropic.com"
1102:  buh_line "   Expected: 404 (API wants auth, not bare GET)"
1103:  buh_e
1104:  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://claude.ai"
1105:  buh_line "   Expected: 403 (web app)"
1106:  buh_e
1107:  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://example.com"
1108:  buh_line "   Expected: 200 (test target on allowlist)"
1109:  buh_e
1110:  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://google.com"
1111:  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
1112:  buh_e
1113:  buh_code "   curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 5 https://registry.npmjs.org"
1114:  buh_line "   Expected: 000 or timeout (blocked)"
1115:  buh_e
1116:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_SENTRY} enforces this with two layers:"
1117:  buh_line "dnsmasq resolves only whitelisted domains; iptables drops"
1118:  buh_line "packets to any IP not in the CIDR allowlist. Both layers"
1119:  buh_line "must agree for traffic to pass."
1120:  buh_e
1121:  buh_line "example.com is included in the ${RBYC_CCYOLO} ${RBYC_NAMEPLATE} specifically"
1122:  buh_line "for this verification step — it proves the allowlist works"
1123:  buh_line "for a non-Anthropic domain."
1124:  buh_e
1129:  buh_step1 "Quench the crucible"
1130:  buh_e
1131:  buh_line "${RBYC_QUENCH} stops and removes all three containers and the"
1132:  buh_line "enclave network:"
1133:  buh_e
1134:  buh_tt  "   " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_QUENCH}" "${z_moniker}"
1135:  buh_e
1136:  buh_line "Clean shutdown. The images stay cached locally — your next charge"
1137:  buh_line "reuses them instantly."
1138:  buh_e
1143:  buh_section "The iteration loop"
1144:  buh_e
1145:  buh_line "You now have the full local cycle:"
1146:  buh_e
1147:  buh_line "  1. Edit the Dockerfile or entrypoint"
1148:  buh_line "  2. Commit your changes (${RBYC_KLUDGE} needs a clean tree)"
1149:  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_KLUDGE} the ${RBYC_BOTTLE}:"
1150:  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_KLUDGE_BOTTLE}" "" " ${z_moniker}"
1151:  buh_line  "  4. Commit the ${RBYC_HALLMARK} change"
1152:  buh_line  "  5. ${RBYC_CHARGE}: Stop and restart"
1153:  buh_tt    "       " "${RBZ_CRUCIBLE_CHARGE}" "${z_moniker}"
1154:  buh_line  "  6. SSH in:"
1155:  buh_line  "       ${z_cmd_ssh}"
1156:  buh_line  "  7. Test your changes"
1157:  buh_e
1158:  buh_line "${RBYC_CHARGE} tears down any prior state before starting, so you"
1159:  buh_line "don't need to Quench between iterations — just Charge again."
1160:  buh_e
1161:  buh_line "Steps 3-7 take under a minute. The ${RBYC_SENTRY} rarely changes, so"
1162:  buh_line "you almost never re-kludge it — the ${RBYC_BOTTLE} is your iteration"
1163:  buh_line "target."
1164:  buh_e
1167:  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
1168:  buh_e
1233:  buh_section "Your First Cloud Build"
1234:  buh_e
1235:  buh_line "This track walks you through the complete ${RBYC_CONJURE} lifecycle:"
1236:  buh_line "provision the builder toolchain, ${RBYC_ORDAIN} your first ${RBYC_VESSEL} via"
1237:  buh_line "Cloud Build, inspect the result, pull it locally, and clean up."
1238:  buh_e
1239:  buh_line "You will build ${z_lk_vessel_name} — the same ${RBYC_SENTRY} you"
1240:  buh_line "already know from the ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} track, but this time built by"
1241:  buh_line "Google Cloud Build with full SLSA provenance."
1242:  buh_e
1245:  buh_line "Prerequisites:"
1246:  buh_e
1249:    buh_line " ${z_buym_yelp} Director credential installed"
1251:    buh_error " [ ] Director credential missing — run:"
1253:    buh_line "      ${z_buym_yelp}"
1257:    buh_line " ${z_buym_yelp} Depot configured (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID populated)"
1259:    buh_error " [ ] Depot not configured — the Payor must establish the Depot first:"
1261:    buh_line "      ${z_buym_yelp}"
1263:  buh_e
1266:    buh_error "Complete the prerequisites above before continuing."
1267:    buh_e
1269:    buh_line "Return to start: ${z_buym_yelp}"
1270:    buh_e
1274:  buh_line "Configure this handbook session:"
1275:  buh_e
1276:  buh_code "   export ONBOARD_VESSEL=${z_vessel}"
1277:  buh_e
1278:  buh_line "This sets the vessel you will build throughout the track."
1279:  buh_line "The remaining steps reference it by name."
1280:  buh_e
1282:  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
1284:  buh_step1 "Inscribe the Reliquary"
1285:  buh_e
1286:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} is a set of builder tool images (skopeo,"
1287:  buh_line "docker, gcloud, syft) that Cloud Build uses during ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
1288:  buh_line "construction. Without it, conjure's preflight check fails."
1289:  buh_e
1290:  buh_line "Think of it as installing the toolchain before your first build."
1291:  buh_line "This is a one-time operation — once inscribed, the reliquary"
1292:  buh_line "stays in the ${RBYC_DEPOT} until you choose to refresh it."
1293:  buh_e
1294:  buh_line "Periodically re-inscribe to pick up newer tool versions. All ${RBYC_VESSELS}"
1295:  buh_line "share the same ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — one inscribe updates the toolchain"
1296:  buh_line "for every build."
1297:  buh_e
1298:  buh_line "Inscribe:"
1299:  buh_e
1301:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1302:  buh_e
1303:  buh_line "This mirrors four tool images from upstream into your Depot's"
1304:  buh_line "GAR. Takes 2-5 minutes depending on network speed."
1305:  buh_e
1307:  buh_line "When inscribe completes, it prints a reliquary datestamp"
1308:  buh_line "(e.g., ${z_buym_yelp}). Every vessel that uses Cloud Build"
1309:  buh_line "needs this value in its regime file:"
1310:  buh_e
1311:  buh_code "   RBRV_RELIQUARY=<datestamp>"
1312:  buh_e
1314:  buh_line "Open ${z_buym_yelp} and set the field,"
1315:  buh_line "then commit the change."
1316:  buh_e
1318:  buh_step1 "${RBYC_CONJURE} the ${RBYC_SENTRY}"
1319:  buh_e
1320:  buh_line "${RBYC_CONJURE} is the build mode where Cloud Build constructs a"
1321:  buh_line "vessel image from the project's Dockerfile and build context."
1322:  buh_e
1323:  buh_line "${RBYC_ORDAIN} is the command that triggers the full pipeline —"
1324:  buh_line "it reads the vessel's ${RBYC_RBRV} regime to determine the mode"
1325:  buh_line "(conjure, bind, or graft) and acts accordingly:"
1326:  buh_e
1330:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1331:  buh_e
1332:  buh_line "This builds on the ${RBYC_TETHERED} pool — Cloud Build has"
1333:  buh_line "public internet access and pulls base images from upstream"
1334:  buh_line "registries during the build. (The ${RBYC_AIRGAP} track removes"
1335:  buh_line "that dependency.)"
1336:  buh_e
1337:  buh_line "The pipeline:"
1338:  buh_e
1339:  buh_line "  1. The host mints a ${RBYC_HALLMARK} — a timestamped tag"
1340:  buh_line "     identifying this build"
1341:  buh_line "  2. A ${RBYC_POUCH} (build context archive) is pushed to GAR"
1342:  buh_line "  3. Cloud Build constructs the image across platforms"
1343:  buh_line "  4. SLSA provenance is generated per platform digest"
1344:  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies the provenance chain"
1345:  buh_e
1346:  buh_warn "Wall-clock: ~15-20 minutes for a 3-platform build."
1347:  buh_line "The command blocks until Cloud Build finishes. Use the time"
1348:  buh_line "to read ahead — the next steps explain what to look for."
1349:  buh_e
1351:  buh_step1 "Capture the hallmark"
1352:  buh_e
1353:  buh_line "When ${RBYC_ORDAIN} completes, it writes the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
1354:  buh_line "to the ${RBYC_OUTPUT} directory — a fixed-path staging area"
1355:  buh_line "that each tabtarget clears and recreates on entry."
1356:  buh_line "Read the hallmark from the fact file and export it so"
1357:  buh_line "you can copy-paste the commands in the remaining steps:"
1358:  buh_e
1359:  buh_code "   export ONBOARD_HALLMARK=\$(cat ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK})"
1360:  buh_e
1362:  buh_step1 "Tour the hallmark artifacts"
1363:  buh_e
1364:  buh_line "Every conjured ${RBYC_HALLMARK} produces a set of tagged"
1365:  buh_line "artifacts in GAR. Each suffix serves a specific role:"
1366:  buh_e
1368:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1369:  buh_line "      A FROM SCRATCH OCI image pushed from host to GAR before"
1370:  buh_line "      the build. Contains the Dockerfile, scripts, and"
1371:  buh_line "      configuration Cloud Build needs. Identical for tethered"
1372:  buh_line "      and airgapped builds — the pool determines network"
1373:  buh_line "      access, not the pouch."
1374:  buh_e
1376:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1377:  buh_line "      The consumer image — a multiplatform manifest list."
1378:  buh_line "      This is what you pull and run."
1379:  buh_e
1381:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1382:  buh_line "      Per-platform provenance-carrying image (one per platform)."
1383:  buh_line "      Shares all layers with -image — only the manifest differs."
1384:  buh_line "      These carry the GCB-attested digests used by vouch."
1385:  buh_e
1387:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1388:  buh_line "      SBOM (software bill of materials) + build info."
1389:  buh_e
1391:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1392:  buh_line "      SLSA provenance verification record."
1393:  buh_e
1395:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1396:  buh_line "      Diagnostics from the build."
1397:  buh_e
1398:  buh_line "Inspect them:"
1399:  buh_e
1401:  buh_step2 "Tally"
1402:  buh_e
1403:  buh_line "${RBYC_TALLY} lists all hallmarks and their health state:"
1404:  buh_e
1406:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1407:  buh_e
1408:  buh_line "Look for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} with health state 'vouched' — that"
1409:  buh_line "means SLSA provenance was verified."
1410:  buh_e
1412:  buh_step2 "Vouch"
1413:  buh_e
1414:  buh_line "${RBYC_VOUCH} verifies SLSA provenance for each platform"
1415:  buh_line "digest in the ${RBYC_HALLMARK}. The ordain pipeline runs ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
1416:  buh_line "automatically. If a build was interrupted before ${RBYC_VOUCH}"
1417:  buh_line "completed, run this to reattempt ${RBYC_VOUCH} on untreated ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}:"
1418:  buh_e
1420:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1421:  buh_e
1422:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_CONJURE} verdict is full SLSA — Cloud Build produced"
1423:  buh_line "this image, and the provenance chain proves it."
1424:  buh_e
1426:  buh_step2 "Plumb"
1427:  buh_e
1428:  buh_line "${RBYC_PLUMB} displays the SBOM, build info, and Dockerfile"
1429:  buh_line "that produced the hallmark. Two modes:"
1430:  buh_e
1434:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1435:  buh_line "   Full provenance display — SBOM packages, build parameters,"
1436:  buh_line "   Dockerfile content."
1437:  buh_e
1441:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1442:  buh_line "   Compact summary — one-line-per-artifact overview."
1443:  buh_e
1445:  buh_step1 "Summon the hallmark"
1446:  buh_e
1447:  buh_line "${RBYC_SUMMON} pulls a set of images affiliated with a"
1448:  buh_line "${RBYC_HALLMARK} that has been ${RBYC_VOUCHED} to your local"
1449:  buh_line "Docker image cache:"
1450:  buh_e
1454:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1455:  buh_e
1457:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1458:  buh_line "   is a multiplatform manifest list."
1459:  buh_line "   Docker resolves it to the image matching your host"
1460:  buh_line "   architecture — the same image that ${RBYC_CHARGE} uses when"
1461:  buh_line "   starting a ${RBYC_CRUCIBLE} from cloud-built ${RBYC_HALLMARKS}."
1462:  buh_e
1467:    buh_line " ${z_buym_yelp} Conjured sentry image found locally (summoned from GAR)"
1469:    buh_line " [ ] No conjured sentry image found locally — run ${RBYC_SUMMON} above"
1471:  buh_e
1473:  buh_step1 "Abjure and Rekon — hallmark lifecycle"
1474:  buh_e
1475:  buh_line "${RBYC_REKON} lists the raw tags for a ${RBYC_VESSEL}"
1476:  buh_line "package in GAR. Run it before and after ${RBYC_ABJURE} to see"
1477:  buh_line "the full lifecycle:"
1478:  buh_e
1482:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1483:  buh_e
1484:  buh_line "You should see all five durable tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK}:"
1486:  buh_line "   ${z_buym_yelp}"
1487:  buh_e
1488:  buh_line "${RBYC_ABJURE} removes all artifacts for a ${RBYC_HALLMARK}"
1489:  buh_line "from GAR. This is permanent — the hallmark and all its"
1490:  buh_line "tags are deleted:"
1491:  buh_e
1495:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1496:  buh_e
1497:  buh_line "After abjure, run Rekon again:"
1498:  buh_e
1502:  buh_line "   ${z_tt}${z_buym_yelp}"
1503:  buh_e
1504:  buh_line "The tags for your ${RBYC_HALLMARK} should be gone. The image is no"
1505:  buh_line "longer in the ${RBYC_DEPOT}."
1506:  buh_e
1508:  buh_section "What you learned"
1509:  buh_e
1510:  buh_line "You just completed the full conjure lifecycle:"
1511:  buh_e
1512:  buh_line "  1. ${RBYC_RELIQUARY} — builder toolchain provisioned"
1513:  buh_line "  2. ${RBYC_CONJURE} — vessel built by Cloud Build with SLSA provenance"
1514:  buh_line "  3. ${RBYC_TALLY}/${RBYC_VOUCH} — health and provenance verified"
1515:  buh_line "  4. ${RBYC_PLUMB} — SBOM and build info inspected"
1516:  buh_line "  5. ${RBYC_SUMMON} — consumer image pulled locally"
1517:  buh_line "  6. ${RBYC_ABJURE}/${RBYC_REKON} — lifecycle cleanup"
1518:  buh_e
1519:  buh_line "This was a ${RBYC_TETHERED} build — Cloud Build had"
1520:  buh_line "internet access. The next track teaches you to remove"
1521:  buh_line "that dependency entirely."
1522:  buh_e
1526:  buh_line "Return to start: ${z_buym_yelp}"
1527:  buh_e
1542:  buh_section "Payor — Establish a Manor and Provision the Depot"
1543:  buh_e
1544:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_PAYOR} establishes a ${RBYC_MANOR} — an administrative seat"
1545:  buh_line "holding the billing account, OAuth client, and operator identity."
1546:  buh_line "Unlike other roles that use service account keys, the ${RBYC_PAYOR}"
1547:  buh_line "authenticates via OAuth — representing the human project owner."
1548:  buh_e
1549:  buh_line "By the end of this handbook you will have a ${RBYC_MANOR}, a ${RBYC_DEPOT}"
1550:  buh_line "funded under it, and a ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} service account ready to administer it."
1551:  buh_e
1553:  buh_line "This ceremony takes about 15 minutes."
1554:  buh_e
1556:  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
1561:  buh_step1 "Establish the Manor"
1562:  buh_e
1563:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_MANORS} GCP project hosts the OAuth client and billing"
1564:  buh_line "account. It must be created before any infrastructure can be"
1565:  buh_line "provisioned."
1566:  buh_e
1567:  buh_line "Run the guided setup:"
1568:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH}"
1569:  buh_e
1570:  buh_line "This guides you through creating the ${RBYC_MANORS} GCP project,"
1571:  buh_line "enabling billing, and configuring the OAuth consent screen. The ${RBYC_MANOR}"
1572:  buh_line "identity is recorded in ${RBYC_RBRP}."
1573:  buh_e
1578:  buh_step1 "Install OAuth credentials"
1579:  buh_e
1580:  buh_line "Step 1 ended with downloading a JSON client secret file from the"
1581:  buh_line "OAuth client you just created. Install it:"
1582:  buh_e
1583:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL}" "" " \${HOME}/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
1584:  buh_e
1585:  buh_line "This walks you through the OAuth authorization flow and stores"
1586:  buh_line "the credential securely."
1587:  buh_e
1588:  buh_line "If you are refreshing an existing credential that has expired:"
1589:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH}"
1590:  buh_e
1595:  buh_step1 "Provision the Depot"
1596:  buh_e
1597:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_DEPOT} is the facility where container images are built and"
1598:  buh_line "stored — a GCP project with a container repository, storage bucket,"
1599:  buh_line "and build infrastructure, funded under the ${RBYC_MANORS} billing account."
1600:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} administers the ${RBYC_DEPOT} — creating"
1601:  buh_line "${RBYC_RETRIEVER} and ${RBYC_DIRECTOR} accounts for those who build and"
1602:  buh_line "retrieve container images."
1603:  buh_e
1604:  buh_line "${RBYC_PAYOR} creates the Depot:"
1605:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_LEVY_DEPOT}"
1606:  buh_e
1607:  buh_line "This enables APIs, creates the Artifact Registry repository and"
1608:  buh_line "Cloud Storage bucket, and configures Cloud Build."
1609:  buh_e
1610:  buh_line "${RBYC_PAYOR} can list Depots for verification:"
1611:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_LIST_DEPOT}"
1612:  buh_e
1613:  buh_line "${RBYC_PAYOR} creates the Governor service account:"
1614:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
1615:  buh_e
1616:  buh_line "Hand the resulting key file to the person who will administer"
1617:  buh_line "this ${RBYC_DEPOT}. After this handoff, the ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} can create"
1618:  buh_line "${RBYC_RETRIEVER} and ${RBYC_DIRECTOR} accounts independently."
1619:  buh_e
1620:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_PAYORS} job for this ${RBYC_DEPOT} is done unless billing or"
1621:  buh_line "project-level changes are needed."
1622:  buh_e
1625:  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
1626:  buh_e
1642:  buh_section "Governor — Administer Service Accounts"
1643:  buh_e
1644:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} administers a ${RBYC_DEPOT} — creating service accounts"
1645:  buh_line "and managing access for those who build and run container images."
1646:  buh_e
1648:  buh_step_style "Step " " — "
1653:  buh_step1 "Install governor credentials"
1654:  buh_e
1655:  buh_line "The ${RBYC_GOVERNOR} works within a ${RBYC_DEPOT} provisioned under the"
1656:  buh_line "${RBYC_PAYORS} ${RBYC_MANOR}. Your Payor creates your credential by running:"
1657:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
1658:  buh_e
1659:  buh_line "If no ${RBYC_DEPOT} exists yet, the ${RBYC_PAYOR} establishes one first:"
1660:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_PAYOR_HB}"
1661:  buh_e
1662:  buh_line "Install the resulting key file into the secrets directory under"
1663:  buh_line "the governor role subdirectory. The path is derived from your"
1664:  buh_line "${RBYC_RBRR} configuration — check RBRR_SECRETS_DIR for the location."
1665:  buh_e
1670:  buh_step1 "Provision downstream service accounts"
1671:  buh_e
1672:  buh_line "The governor provisions access for two downstream roles:"
1673:  buh_e
1674:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_RETRIEVER} has read access to the ${RBYC_DEPOT} — they pull and run"
1675:  buh_line "container images that others have built."
1676:  buh_line "A ${RBYC_DIRECTOR} has build and publish access — they create container"
1677:  buh_line "images and push them to the registry."
1678:  buh_e
1679:  buh_line "Create a ${RBYC_RETRIEVER} with read access (${RBYC_CHARTER}):"
1680:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_CHARTER_RETRIEVER}"
1681:  buh_e
1682:  buh_line "Create a ${RBYC_DIRECTOR} with build access (${RBYC_KNIGHT}):"
1683:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_KNIGHT_DIRECTOR}"
1684:  buh_e
1685:  buh_line "Each command creates the service account and applies the IAM"
1686:  buh_line "grants it needs. The output is an ${RBYC_RBRA} key file — hand it to"
1687:  buh_line "the Retriever or Director user."
1688:  buh_e
1689:  buh_line "List issued service accounts:"
1690:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
1691:  buh_e
1696:  buh_step1 "Verify the chain"
1697:  buh_e
1698:  buh_line "The service accounts you created include IAM grants — each SA"
1699:  buh_line "gets exactly the permissions its role requires, no more."
1700:  buh_line "${RBYC_RETRIEVER} gets read access."
1701:  buh_line "${RBYC_DIRECTOR} gets read, write, and build trigger access."
1702:  buh_e
1703:  buh_line "Verify the complete chain works by installing both credentials"
1704:  buh_line "locally and running the credential handbook tracks:"
1705:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_RETRIEVER}"
1706:  buh_tt  "  " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_CRED_DIRECTOR}"
1707:  buh_e
1708:  buh_line "If the ${RBYC_RETRIEVER} can pull from the ${RBYC_DEPOT} and the"
1709:  buh_line "${RBYC_DIRECTOR} can see the registry, your grants are correct."
1710:  buh_e
1713:  buh_tt  "Return to start: " "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
1714:  buh_e
